message:
refactor(workflows): replace ad-hoc policy summary JSON with typed WorkflowStepPolicySummary

The workflow engine was constructing policy summary JSON via manual
serde_json::Map insertion and parsing it back with raw JSON field access.
This refactors both sides to use typed structures:

- WorkflowStepPolicyDecision enum: Allow, Deny, RequireApproval, Error
  with snake_case serde and is_allowed() helper
- WorkflowStepPolicySummary struct: typed fields for decision, action,
  rule_id, reason, summary, error, and decision_context (the new typed
  DecisionContext from the policy engine), with skip_serializing_if for
  clean JSON output
- from_injection(): constructs typed summary from InjectionResult,
  extracting decision context via decision.context().cloned()
- parse(): deserializes from string for consumer-side use
- policy_summary_decision_is_allow(): convenience function that tries
  typed parse first, falls back to raw JSON "decision" field check for
  backwards compatibility with existing log entries
- plan_helpers.rs check_step_idempotency: replaced 7-line inline JSON
  parsing with single policy_summary_decision_is_allow() call
- mod.rs test: updated to use WorkflowStepPolicySummary::parse() with
  typed assertions on decision_context fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
